query:
INSERT INTO pipelineDeals 
  (clientName, clientContact, clientEmail, clientPhone, dealName, serviceType, facility, company, stage, 
   estimatedMonthlyRevenue, estimatedAnnualRevenue, estimatedPallets, estimatedLoads, 
   keyServices, notes, probability, proposalDate)
VALUES 
  ('Southern Glazer''s Wine & Spirits', NULL, NULL, NULL, 
   'PA Direct Delivery - 5 Zone Coverage', 'transportation', 'PA-1151', 'L&M', 'proposal_sent',
   4904100, 58849700, NULL, NULL,
   '244 locations across PA, 5 service zones, 1,254 cases/week, per-case pricing ($5.50-$18.00), transfer surcharge ($2.25), large order discounts',
   'Direct delivery across all PA. Zone 1 Pittsburgh Metro, Zone 2 Pittsburgh Surrounding, Zone 3 Central PA, Zone 4 Northern PA, Zone 5 Premium. 10% surcharge until >90% of Zone 1&2 volume awarded. 3-year contract, CPI up to 5% annually. Q1 2026 start. Phased implementation.',
   60, NOW());

   60, NOW());
